meaning: adv.<美口>近似,有几分,可以说是
examples: Grandmas are sorta like extra moms f.
Water restored, sorta. On the bright side, I now know what very dangerous face water looks like.
If asked in a flighty, "Valley girl" way, the students punctuated their answers with "like, " "sorta" and "kinda."
Also, Milagrow sorta undercut the whole female tablet angle by making two of the colors grey and black.
They are only a way to model what might happen in a mammal sorta kinda related to us.
